programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews and his officers race against time to find a stolen oil indicator device that contains potentially lethal radioactive pellets.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A neo-Nazi psycho has planted a bomb somewhere in L.A. Friday and Gannon have to find it.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon help an employee rescue her kidnapped boss.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred and Barney encounter unexpected problems when they plan to get rich as songwriters.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony visit some of Tennessee's most popular attractions on the next stop of their Trekkin' all 50 tour."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Larry is furious when Beaver leaves him out when he joins a club called the Bloody Five. To get revenge, Larry makes up a story that he is starting his own club and that people are waiting in line to join. This prompts Beaver to resign from the Bloody Five and he tries to join Larry's bogus club.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally lends his school sweater to Frances and quickly finds getting it back is going to be difficult because the girl keeps making up excuses. Things reach a boiling point when Ward and June overhear Frances bragging to her friends how Wally is chasing after her.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Scandalous Sculptor
programme.desc: Scandal rocks the art world when a model is found dead, presumably murdered by the jealous wife of a sculptor.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When Sam Chandler is found murdered, his lawyer, David O'Malley, is the prime suspect—in part because Sam was sleeping with David's wife.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Tragic story of an alcoholic teen who accidentally kills a little girl while she is drinking and driving.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Boy gets a job reading to a blind woman

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: To Marshal Matt Dillon and his deputies falls their grimmest task in many years—the hanging of a ruthless gunman.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: While in the bank arranging for a letter of credit, Ben and Hoss encounter the bank robbing Morgan gang. Both Ben and one of Morgan's men get shot. When Billy Morgan dies, his brothers promise to avenge his death by going after Ben.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas shoots a horse thief who turns out to be a member of the Boyle clan, and now Ma Boyle is after him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Seven condemned murderers escape and take over the town of North Fork.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: During a stopover in the town of adobe flats, a local lothario puts the moves on a female passenger.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: While on duty in a rural area, Reed and Malloy request the assistance of the DEA to build a case against the smug pilot of a light plane whom they suspect is involved in a drug smuggling operation.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed transport an unconscious 8-year-old boy to Rampart General Hospital and help him and his parents cope with the ordeal. Afterwards, they assist a child welfare hotline operator locate a 15-year-old girl who has intentionally overdosed on pills, and then race to find the boy they brought in earlier after he escapes from the hospital.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry returns from a week in Tokyo, announcing that he is in love with a 20-year-old girl named Nancy Sue Parker. When she arrives for the weekend, it isn't long before she starts making advances on Hawkeye.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: In this riotous episode, Hawkeye gets wrapped up in a convoluted scheme to procure a new pair of boots.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Private Baker, who is always going AWOL, is desperate for plastic surgery on his nose. Hawkeye gets an old friend, and plastic surgeon, to visit the camp, promising him a nurse called "The Barracuda." They put together an elaborate scheme to perform the operation without Frank or Margaret finding out.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A Korean family sets up camp in the middle of the compound. A Korean woman with a baby comes looking for the father, and names Radar.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a stranger comes to town, Barney and the people of Mayberry grow suspicious when he seems to know too much about them.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When a Hollywood film crew decides to use Mayberry as a backdrop for a movie, everyone in town begins to put on airs, risking the small-town charm that attracted the crew in the first place.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny predicts that Elly will get married, but Jed doesn’t believe her. However, when Jethro tells them Sonny Drysdale is returning, Granny believes that this will be Jed’s future son-in-law. Drysdale believes the same thing, and has Sonny and Elly set up to be married. Drysdale makes Sonny get a job, selling beauty products door-to-door.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: A wild story told by an 11-year-old about his recent trip to the moon entralls Eb and Lisa. Oliver believes none of it, especially when the kid sells Lisa a "moon rock" for $14. But once the rock stars beeping under the moonlight (and when Arnold snorts at it), he suspects he's the subject of a practical joke. Oliver ships it off to NASA for their scientists to examine.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan steals a top-secret document from Klink's coat to save him from being arrested.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan gets Klink to let him play camp commander so he can get a French agent released.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Give Him the Needle, two feuding doctors use a patient as a bargaining chip. Then, in Mr. Cool, Harvey tries to teach Tim how to charm the ladies. Finally, in Call Me a Doctor, Vicki double-crosses her crook boyfriend, using a naive doctor.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.desc: After the death of her husband and partner, Joe Doyle, Constant Doyle takes on a case involving a young man who knew her husband. She asks for Mason's help and he suggests she hire the Paul Drake Detective agency.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A superstitious newlywed becomes obsessed by a penny fortune-telling machine when he and his new wife are stranded with car trouble.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A young man convinces his girlfriend to accept the marriage proposal from an old, sick and very rich man.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Guilt and fear plague a woman when her husband returns from prison after serving time for a crime she committed.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: As movie starlet Anne Marion is scheduled to release her tell-all memoirs, an attempt is made on her life.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A suicide by a pilot leads to the discovery of a plan by a mercenary group to launch a coup of a small African country.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby is hired by an insurance company to investigate a waterfront murder involving a merchant sailor.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Matthews investigates when a courier with a criminal record disappears with money.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A new officer has been arrested for robbing a liquor store while on an undercover assignment.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Four bandits wearing red masks commit a series of robberies.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: On a visit to a ranch, "Indians" who are actors in a movie that is filming nearby chase Fred and Barney.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony explore curious examples of popular false memories, from Fruit of the Loom's phantom cornucopia to Ed McMahon's missing checks."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After seeing someone being hypnotized in a movie, Beaver sets out to do the same. He tries hypnotism on Eddie—who pretends Beaver has hypnotized him—and Beaver gets scared when Eddie won't snap out of the trance.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After drawing Alma's name for a school picnic, Wally finds himself meeting her parents and her mother takes an immediate liking to Wally, setting him and Alma up on numerous dates, but then turns around and accuses Wally of monopolizing Alma's time.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Sleepy Slayer
programme.desc: When a man is accused of killing his employer, who still owed him $50,000 for an accident years before, it's up to Mason to find the real killer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock agrees to defend Wally McDaniels, a fellow choir member, after he is arrested for killing the man who had turned him in to the police for stealing rare books.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A sniper fells a girl involved in an interracial romance.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Walton gets job in city because he wants an adventure

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A vengeful prisoner poses a continual threat to the life of Marshal Matt Dillon.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam is seeing a young woman, Sue-Ellen Terry. He seems to be serious about her until after a sudden turn of events, he finds himself defending a murder charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Mark finds gold on their property, a fast-talking salesman who tried to sell Lucas a new lightning rod offers instead to buy the ranch's mineral rights.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Micah is badly injured by an escaping prisoner, Lucas tracks the prisoner back to his home town.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Dora Gray has made some poor choices in her life. Just wanting to get to San Francisco, her latest one involves someone who sells Army guns to the indians, and Flint finds himself right in the middle of it.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: After completing a hazardous driving refresher course, Sgt. MacDonald assigns Malloy and Reed to a nighttime undercover bicycle patrol to test Officer Wells' idea on how to deal with a rash of residential car break-ins. The next day, they pull over a hippie with an obnoxious passenger, and then put their refreshed driving skills to the test when called to a burglary in progress at a new car showroom.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed puts his reputation on the line when he decides to file a formal complaint against a fellow officer after witnessing him use excessive force. On patrol, he and Malloy search for suspects in two separate robberies.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: While there are no casualties, Hawkeye and Trapper crate up Frank while he sleeps and receive gorilla suits through the mail. Henry gets a tan and gives another sex orientation lecture. When the wounded start pouring in again, their own side shells the camp, hitting the generator, and Radar tries to get through to tell someone to stop the shelling.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The supply lines to the camp are cut. Radar, the housing officer, starts doubling people up to save fuel and Klinger is thrown out of the nurse's tent. People start burning everything to stay warm while Frank wears his heated socks. The toilet paper supply is worst hit, and then wounded start arriving.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Burns tries to slap a dishonorable discharge on a decorated soldier who admits to being a homosexual.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The arrival of a new batch of mail leaves Trapper depressed, and thinking of desertion, despite Hawkeye's efforts to dissuade him. Meanwhile, Hawkeye learns that he has successfully tricked Frank into buying stocks in a fictitious company, Pioneer Aviation.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ignoring his own advice to Opie, Andy plays fast and loose with the facts when trying to sell the old town cannon.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Andy teases the fairer sex about gossiping, Aunt Bee pulls a prank to prove that men are gossips, too.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: After Drysdale stops the clan from going back home to deliver a baby, the Clampetts try to help the Brewsters with their baby, while Jethro unsuccessfully tries to open his own version of the Kitty Kat Club. Of course, the Brewsters don't need the help because they are adopting, though after hearing the explanation given, the Clampetts believe they really need help and advice.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's skittish Uncle Fedor uses the Douglases home to hide out--mostly under the bed and sofa. He claims he's on the run from the Secet Police who want him for smuggling a secret formula. When a man with a scar and another without an ear are spotted in Hooterville, his wild tale starts to seem believable.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Crittendon disrupts Hogan's plan to blow up a tunnel and stop a convoy of rocket fuel.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Some Of Their Planes Are Missing
programme.desc: The Germans plan to send their men into England via captured planes.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Oldest Man, The / Hollow Hero, The
programme.desc: In The Oldest Man, Harvey goes to the doctor, the Oldest Man. Then, in The Hollow Hero, Princess Vicki wants to marry a man who swallowed a grenade, much to her royal parents' dismay.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Libelous Locket
programme.desc: A dance student is charged with murder when her instructor is found dead after they had a physical altercation.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The daughter of an inventor objects to their "perfect" home, where they are waited on by faultless robotic servants.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Susan Harper craves attention so desperately that she makes up a story about being attacked by a man.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Bravery is not a man's only motivation when he picks up a weapon and goes after a liquor store robber.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is hired when a sniper begins killing citizens, the prime suspect being an escaped mental patient.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired by a man who is charged with arson and murder by burning down his textile company which killed his wife who was trapped inside.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A husband kills a man he thought was his wife's lover.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: A young man must cover up his father's theft.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Two con men, posing as bank examiners, are bilking the elderly out of their life savings.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An elderly apartment manager is found to have been beaten to death with a hammer.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: After leaving his job at the quarry, Fred becomes the nervous driver of a school bus.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony indulge in the cool tastes of summer."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver asks his parents if he could ride his new bike to school instead of the bus, and after some hesitating they finally agree to it. However, on the first day, a naive Beaver gets his bike stolen.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally asks out a rich girl who drops hints that she would like an orchid for her corsage. Wally quickly discovers that getting one is going to be more difficult then he originally thought.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Tsarina's Tiara
programme.desc: When a jeweler and gem expert is pulled over for speeding, the corpse of an international jewel thief is found in the trunk.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock reluctantly agrees to spend the weekend as part of a murder mystery with Cliff, Leanne and three people who each paid $10,000 for the privilege of matching wits with the famous Ben Matlock. When the pretend victim turns up dead, Matlock and his team must determine which of the three paying customers is the guilty party.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil defends Parker after he is falsely accused of police brutality by a drug dealer. The prosecution's main witness - the man's girlfriend, who was once engaged to Parker.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Former neighbor, an elderly man comes back to Walton's Mountain to live

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus Haggen is mistaken for a hired gunman and offered $300 to fight and run out of town the three sons of a man his cousin is accused of killing.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss and Joe are out on a hunting trip when they come across a pregnant indian woman. Hoss and Joe look after the woman and end up delivering her baby. After deciding to take her back to the ranch house, they soon discover that they are being followed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When an outlaw leader lures Marshal Torrance out of town, Lucas is the only one who can stop him from lynching a local man who killed one of the members of his gang.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former army captain comes to North Fork to kill the man who shot down his son in a gunfight—Lucas McCain.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: The MacGregor clan decides to come to America and start a new life. The wagon trains going to California have had a hard time dealing with their different customs. Can Major Adams' be any different?

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed's investigation of a fatal shooting in a hotel room hinges on the eyewitness account of a hopeless wino named Harry who is desperate to make a name for himself. Meanwhile, they investigate a report of a peeping tom at the home of an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: It's Malloy's birthday, but he's consumed with anger over the thought his colleagues might have a plan to throw him a surprise party. On a busy patrol, he and Reed make an ironic traffic stop while responding to a burglary call at an antique store, deal with an extremely embarrassed theft victim at a lingerie store, investigate suspicious activity at a service station, use a creative approach to apprehend a serial jewelry store burglar and engage in a shootout inside the police station's parking garage.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A classic episode in which Colonel Flagg and another secret agent from another intelligence agency come to the 4077th to keep their eyes on the camp. Hawkeye and Trapper trick them both into thinking that Burns is a traitor—one thinks he's a fascist, the other thinks he's a communist.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The MASH 4077th is visted by General Steele. He wishes to move the camp five miles down the road. Hawkeye and Henry are charged with mutiny. And Hawkeye also is charged with impersonating a reporter.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: As Hawkeye and Trapper are planning to leave for Tokyo, an unusual offer to swap POW patients between the Chinese and the 4077th comes in. Henry, after much debate, agrees to send Hawkeye, Trapper, Frank, Radar and Klinger into enemy territory. Frank almost botches the swap when he brings a squirt gun to the exchange. Fortunately, the Chinese Dr. Lin Tam has a sense of humor.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: While Henry is away in Seoul, Burns and Houlihan are in charge, and Hawkeye is the officer of the day. His refusal to release a wounded Korean soldier, wanted by US Intelligence, leads to a confrontation with Colonel Flagg.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy is chosen to be the sole judge of a local beauty pageant. The entrants include Floyd's niece, the mayor's daughter and Ellie Walker.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney, on a spree of destroying illegal stills, are surprised when a trail leads them to two spinster sisters.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Granny decide Jethro needs a job. They send him down to the bank to try to get work. While he is there, he runs into a magician, Marvo the Magnificent. After Marvo learns of his uncle’s many, many millions, he agrees to go home with Jethro. Marvo puts on a show for the Clampetts, and afterwards Jethro decides to become a magician.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: In a personals ad, Eb advertises himself as a wealthy landowner. He begins communicating with a woman with a Park Avenue address, prompting him to exagerate his worth even more. By the time she arrives for a visit, Eb is passing the Douglases off as sharecroppers who work for him.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan pulls a hoax to get a general to believe Klink is replacing him as chief of staff.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: The Gestapo gets a female to pry information out of Schultz.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Steve Lawrence And Eydie Gorme
programme.desc: In 200 Years Ago Today, Harvey reminisces about the old Revolutionary days. Then, in Kitchen Commercials, Carol and the gang perform a TV commercial parody about kitchen products. Next, in By the Time I Get to Phoenix, Carol tries to run away from her husband, but every form of transportation fails her. Then, in The Cafeteria, customers steal each other's seats in a crowded lunchroom. Finally, in Salute to Universal Studios, Carol and the gang parody classic movies, including Hamlet, Rooster Cogburn, Freud, and Earthquake.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Two-faced Turnabout
programme.desc: When a Balkan dictator with ties to an American businessman dies, the race is on to destroy papers belonging to him that may implicate the businessman in corruption.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An aging actor longing for the good old days is given a sobering glimpse of the past he holds so dear.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man hires a detective to follow his wife in hopes of finding grounds for divorce.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A writer is shocked and far from happy when his long-missing wife reappears.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Intertect is accused of stealing plans and a formula to create a laser ray, forcing Mannix and Lew Wickersham into a deadly feud.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired when a young brother of a gun manufacturer and collector vanishes from sight.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby tries to determine if a psychic had anything to do with a lawyer's death.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Mathews personally takes on the task of protecting a former crime boss who is scheduled to testify before a grand jury.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon try to figure out a pattern to a series of candy store hold-ups. The solution comes when they discover that there are two suspects.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: "Gannon goes undercover as a buyer in order to trap fur thieves"

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred and Barney suspect the worst when a neighbor's wife disappears.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill shares cool tips, tricks and hacks he's learned online."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward's cherished autographed baseball becomes the object that Larry and Beaver just can't keep their hands off of. They decide to play catch with it and it ends up getting run over by a truck.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver wants a pet and Ward and June object to his latest one, a mouse. They tell him they can have a sensible pet, so when Beaver and Larry see an ad at the market giving away a free monkey, Beaver jumps at the chance and Ward and June find their house the new home for Stanley, the Monkey.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Betrayed Bride
programme.desc: A recently widowed women becomes tangled in a web of suspicion when she hastily remarries a fortune-hunting Frenchman. When the Frenchman's ex-wife comes looking for him, he turns up shot dead in a swimming pool.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock vies with a formidable district attorney while defending a client accused of killing a city councilwoman, discovering a secret hiding in the man's past that is affecting his judgment in the case.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Maybelle's new phone sex business is a great success - until one her girls decides to moonlight as a prostitute.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Grandpa has heart problems. Thinks he is going to die.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young gunman (Zalman King) falls for one of Kitty's saloon girls (Lane Bradbury) while waiting to kill Marshal Matt Dillon and rob the bank.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Ben sends Hoss and Little Joe down to Mexico to purchase the bull known as El Toro Grande. While down there, Joe gets involved with the beautiful daughter of El Toro's owner and Hoss finds out that the son of one of the ranch hands has formed a very deep attachment to the bull.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A new store owner upsets the town by demanding that all credit accounts be paid off.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The widow of a bandit killed by Lucas plots a grotesque revenge.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Bill Tawnee served his country heroically. When Major Adams recognizes him on the trail, he asks his wife to join his wagon train even though there is plenty of anti-indian sentiment afloat.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed suspect that a well-armed immigrant tailor who claims to be defending his establishment from burglars is actually plotting a murder. In the meantime, they deal with a drunken traveling businessman who passes out in a bar girl's car.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate an interstate bounty hunter who has an invalid gun permit and questionable tactics. Meanwhile, they deal with an elderly man who strongly dislikes hippies, and a frustrated wife who desperately wants to receive a traffic ticket.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: General 'Iron Guts' Kelly arrives for an inspection, and ends up dying in Margaret's tent. Hawkeye and Trapper help the General's aide smuggle him out of camp. The next day he is reported killed at the front, as that is where he would have wanted to die.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The O.R. is filled with more wounded than the unit can handle. Hawkeye does heart massage on a soldier, which saves his life, but he dies four hours later. Sidney Freedman drops in during the deluge, and is dragged into the fray by Hawkeye.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When spring arrives, Klinger gets word from home that his sweetheart back in Toledo wants to marry him. Henry arranges for Father Mulcahy to do this over short wave radio. Radar falls in love with a nurse, while a grateful patient won't leave Hawkeye alone, and even threatens Major Burns.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Trapper gets an ulcer and a ticket home. Unfortunately, his going-away party is spoiled by a new Army regulation, which forces him to stay.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy counsels a Mayberry couple who are constantly bickering with each other.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy becomes suspicious when a record promoter comes to town to gather material for a folk music album.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It is spring cleaning time, and Granny is trying to clean the mansion from top to bottom. Jed wants to stop her from doing this and thinks the way to do so is to get Granny out of Beverly Hills. He tells the family to make Granny think she is too tired and too old to work so hard, and Jethro and Elly lay it on a bit too heavy. But it works, and Granny does stop the cleaning.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: To his chagrin, Oliver learns he shares his birthday with Arnold Ziffle. While Oliver's convinced he's going to be feted with a surprise party, he refuses to spread the joy by getting a gift for the pig.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.sub-title: Funny Thing Happened On The Way To London
programme.desc: Winston Chuchill's right-hand man, Group Captain "Robbie" Roberts, is shot down, captured and brought to Stalag 13. The Luftwaffe scheme to assassinate Churchill by keeping Roberts in the cooler while an impostor escapes to England to carry out the job.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Burkhalter plans to get Klink to marry his sister, while a Gestapo plant has infiltrated the underground.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Washington Wacko / D.m.v., The / I'll Do The Talking
programme.desc: In Washington Wacko, Carol goes bananas just before her husband meets the President. Then, in The D.M.V., Harvey's license plate gets mixed up with a confusing employee. Finally, in I'll Do the Talking, Carol and Tim talk to each other and over each other, oblivious to what they other is saying.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Surplus Suitor
programme.desc: After a wealthy heiress' uncle is found dead, she is charged with the murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Small-time crooks end up with a camera that takes photos of events five minutes into the future.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man just released from prison becomes desperate when his stash of money disappears.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man decides to get away from his nagging, invalid wife once and for all.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is fired from Intertect while his boss suffers from a medically induced psychosis, causing Joe to use desperate measures to crack the case and save Wickersham's life.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: A young convict is being harassed by a prisoner who is running a gambling operation inside of the lock up.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The prime suspect in a jewel heist is robbed of his gems, his spouse and his life by his own lawyer.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: When the canine star of a television commercial and its human director decide to stay at the Shady Rest, Uncle Joe and the girls are starstruck, leaving Dog feeling like he's been replaced.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: With the sheriff on vacation for a few days, Sam Drucker, as Justice of the Peace, sends habitual shoplifter Eustace Pockle to jail—at the Shady Rest!

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny is preparing for her Possum Queen campaign, and also wondering why Mrs. Drysdale hasn’t fought back yet. When Jed asks Drysdale about this, he starts her campaign with a false radio interview and continues to try to get a Possum festival going. Granny continues with her campaign, and Mrs. Drysdale realizes that she has been campaigning without even knowing.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro tells Jed that he has inherited a castle in England, after hearing the word from Drysdale. He gets costumes from Tudor times, thinking that Queen Elizabeth I is still reigning. Jethro even makes Granny wear an oaf costume, since she doesn’t have Clampett blood. Drysdale and Jane visit, and Jane tells the Clampetts that what Jethro is telling them is wrong. But after Drysdale paints a picture for Jane, the two convince the Clampetts to go, even providing an oaf for Jethro, Miss Jane.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: Private Eye Popeye, Abusement Park, Robin Hood-winked
programme.desc: "Olive asks Popeye to guard a precious gem., Popeye takes Olive to the carnival where he starts demonstrating his prowess on the bell-ringing machine. Bluto appears and proceeds to outdo him., Popeye stars as Robin Hood."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Sufferin' Cats, Two Little Pups, Cat Napping
programme.desc: "Jerry is a prize to be won between Tom and an alley cat because neither feline wants to share him., Two energetic puppies harass and get harassed by a big chicken that gets over a wall separating their two properties., Jerry is snoozing on a hammock but Tom wants it for himself."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: The Tree Medic, Polar Pests, The Hams That Couldn't Be Cured, The Loan Stranger, Salmon Yeggs, Misguided Missile
programme.desc: "Woody goes head-to-head with a Tree Doctor who's disturbing his home., Chilly tries to avoid becoming a replacement penguin at the zoo., A wolf is about to be hanged for taking the lives of the three little pigs, but it turns out it was the pigs who wrecked his home playing jive music., A wolf in loan officer's clothing pursues Woody after he forgets to repay a loan., Windy tries to show his son Breezy how to steal from a salmon cannery, but gets sealed in a can himself., Dapper Denver Dooley buys an insurance policy from Woody but then refuses to pay for it. Woody then sends a missle toward Dooley, which is not covered by his policy."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: The Heckling Hare, Scaredy Cat, She Was An Acrobat's Daug, Wacky Wabbit, Little Orphan Airedale, High Diving Hare
programme.desc: "A dopey dog goes sniffing down Bug's hole to find a rabbit. While he digs, Bugs comes out and watches. The bunny gives him a big kiss on the face and the dog chases after him in hot pursuit. , On a dark night, Porky Pig brings Sylvester to their new home, a Gothic mansion. , A typical afternoon at the movies is lampooned in this looney trip to the cinema. , Elmer Fudd is prospecting for gold in the desert by digging holes across the landscape and throwing a stick of dynamite in every one. But every time, Bugs Bunny throws it back at him. , Rags McMutt escapes from the city pound and runs into his old friend Charlie. Charlie tells him how he found an owner so that Rags can hopefully find one too. , Sam forces Bugs into a high diving position but unlucky for him Bugs tricks Sam into doing the high dives."

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon are mixed up in the affairs of the royal family of Karovnia when they come to the U.S. fleeing from assassins in their home country. The agents find that the evil Count Balkovitch is pursuing them, looking for an icon he needs to possess to hold power in Karovnia.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Jack Hanford built his wealth with the intention of passing it on to his son. However, the son turns it all down to honor his Cheyenne heritage when his mother dies. To make matters worse, in his son's eyes, Hanford had sent for a woman he briefly knew to replace his mother before she had died.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Nick and Heath travel separately to a mining town to investigate a collapsed mine. When Nick arrives, he finds a hostile populace—and no Heath.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A boy (Eddie Hodges) comes to Dodge City in search of his father, only to learn that he is a wanted criminal.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: A young woman's life is ruined by her relation to criminals. Only the Cartwrights treat her differently. When she turns to Clay Renton, an ex-con, and Ben must help her out of a bad situation.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: After rescuing soldiers under Indian attack, Favor learns that their sergeant was involved in the deaths of the Indian chief's wife and son.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Feeling that the townspeople of Santos, New Mexico, have gone too far in their efforts to destroy a ruthless gunfighter, Paladin allows the man to return to his hometown on the condition that he hangs up his guns. But when he arrives there and finds that his sweetheart has married another, more trouble ensues.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired to find Baa-Baa, a beloved pet of Mrs. Goode's. Her husband is desperate to find Baa-Baa as he is in the dog house with her until Baa-Baa returns. Josh reluctantly goes to look for the lost sheep amid much ridicule from other ranchers and cowboys alike.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and his friend become trapped in an old mine.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark attempt to reform a con man.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: All The World's A Stooge, Dizzy Pilots, If A Body Meets A Body, G.i. Wanna Go Home, Hold That Lion, Malice In The Palace
programme.desc: "The Stooges are window washers who lose their jobs after Moe impersonates the dentist in whose office they were cleaning. On the run, they are hired by a millionaire to pose as children. It seems the man's wife wants to adopt some refugees to impress her society friends. Moe is Johnny, Curly is Frankie and Larry is Mabel. Everything goes fairly well as the lady shows off the Stooges to her friends, but they finally irritate her husband so much that he goes after them with an ax. , The Stooges are the Wrong brothers, three inventors trying to finish building an airplane they can sell to the army and thereby avoid the draft. When their plane, the "Buzzard", turns out to be a flop, the boys are drafted into the army where they have trouble with a tough drill sergeant. , "Set in a desert land where the stooges run a restaurant, the boys set out to recover the stolen Rootin Tootin diamond after they learn from the thieves that the Emir of Shmo has absconded with the contraband jewel. They journey to the stronghold of Shmo where they disguise as Santa Clauses and scare the ruler into giving them the diamond. " , When Moe reads that Curly's rich uncle has died, and has left his estate to Curly, the boys go there to collect. They find that the uncle was murdered and his body and will are missing., The Stooges are discharged from the army and go to see their fiancées, but find they have been dispossessed and the wedding is off until they find a home. The boys have trouble finding a vacant apartment so they set up housekeeping in a vacant lot. Their housing problems seem to be solved until a farmer destroys their new home with a tractor. The Stooges then build a house of their own, but the girls aren't impressed with the one room mansion and walk out on them. , The Stooges are gypped out of their inheritance by Icabob Slipp, a crooked lawyer. The boys follow Slipp onto a passenger train and corner him, but not before they accidentally let a lion loose on the train. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "A science-fiction tale of an expedition to the "angry red planet" of Mars...running into all sorts of alien terrors, including unfriendly Martian plants and a terrifying kind of giant mouse/spider hybrid."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Mr. Freeze obtains the instant ice formula and builds an Ice-Ray to freeze the entire country! To prove his word, he ices down various parts of Gotham.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: A landing party, including the command staff, are infected with a disease that causes rapid aging and senility.

programme.title: Kolchak: The Night Stalker
programme.desc: A grandmother seeks revenge for her grandson's death by turning him into a zombie to do her bidding.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: Dr. Smith is confronted with a dead ringer for himself called Zeno, who is a fugitive on the run and gets Smith to take the wrap for his crimes.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: The Seaview, sent to avert worldwide tidal waves by detonating a nuclear device in polar regions, is harried by a determined enemy.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: The castaways agree to help a professor fix his robot creation in exchange for help returning to Earth. But the professor proves to be less than trustworthy.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: Warrior-prophet Joshua sends Tony and Doug into Jericho as spies before he attacks the Biblical city.

programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: A planned moon mission causes Vincent and an astronaut to suspect danger.

programme.title: The Powers of Matthew Star
programme.desc: "After developing powers, a teenager realizes he's not from Earth."

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: A famous film star comes to Bayside to shoot an anti-drug PSA. The gang is enamored with him but then they discover that he uses drugs himself.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: If Zack can just get out of detention, he has a chance at winning a trip to Hawaii. Doing their best to get him off the hook, the gang ends up in detention, too.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: On Valentine's Day, the gang flashes back to the romantic adventures they've had in the past.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: Slater and his father fight over where he should attend college and Zack tries to fix it. Meanwhile, Jessie becomes a cheerleader and worries about college acceptances.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: After Zack buys class rings for all the seniors at Bayside, he's embarrassed to find out he's been had when the rings turn out to be phonies.

programme.title: Saved by the Bell
programme.desc: It's the annual Fourth of July beauty pageant and Zack is one of the judges. Carosi wants Zack to choose Stacey no matter what it takes.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: A custody fight ensues when the Rubbles discover a baby boy on their doorstep.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: When Fred forgets Dino's anniversary, a despondent Dino runs away from home.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Myopic Fred takes a monkey to the circus, believing it to be his daughter, Pebbles.

programme.title: The Jetsons
programme.desc: George thinks Elroy has made flying pills, so he takes it to Spacely to turn into a fortune and put Spacely's competitor, Cogswell, out of business for good.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.sub-title: To Move Or Not To Move
programme.desc: With constant complaints about the size of the house bombarding Mike and Carol, Mike puts the house up for sale and looks into buying a new one. It isn't long after that that the house appears to be haunted.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Each thinking their spouse has a much easier time of it, Mike and Carol switch roles for a day. Carol must help the boys with baseball practice and Mike must help Marcia with a cooking badge.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wanting Ward to become a millionaire, Beaver buys him a book called "I Became a Millionaire in Twelve Months." Ward thanks him for it but Beaver quickly learns that Ward is just being polite as to spare his feelings.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After revealing that he wants to be a writer when he grows up, Ward buys Beaver a diary to practice writing and Beaver begins keeping a record of his daily activities. However, June and Ward pick the lock and sneak a peek at his diary after Beaver neglects to come home on time.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts are on the plane to England, with Sir Jethro as their leader. But with this comes a detour. The Clampetts get off the plane in San Francisco, after Jethro believes it is England. They get back on the plane and do finally arrive in England and are told that Jed’s cousin, Marcus, is late, meaning deceased, but they think he means late because he is diseased. After they arrive, Granny runs into trouble at the customs inspector’s office and gets her medical supplies and her jug confiscated.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts finally arrive at Clampett Castle, and meet Mr. Faversham, who they call Major Domo after a misunderstanding with his name, also mistaking his name for a greeting. Granny decides to check on Marcus, but doesn’t know that the dog of the house is sitting in his bed. She feels the dog through the curtain and thinks the staff and doctors have been neglecting him. Jethro is working on fulfilling his duty as a knight and decides to start hunting dragons.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: Gilligan has the winning ticket for a South American sweepstakes.

programme.title: Gilligan's Island
programme.desc: The Professor thinks that the island is sinking, which causes the castaways to panic.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: Vint and Naomi convince Mama to participate in a television game show, promising to use any winnings on a house downpayment.

programme.title: Mama's Family
programme.desc: When the family goes out to celebrate Eunice's birthday, a fight between Mama and Eunice ends with both of them getting arrested.

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: April returns with her fiance; two writers decide to finish their marriage with their script; a girl unknowingly befriends her father.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney's overzealous policing enrages the people of Mayberry.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Automobilia collector Joe Salzburg has been collecting all things cars since childhood and now has over 20,000 items in his collection. Toy and car expert Joel Magee appraises Joe's collection and offers a vintage slot car set in trade."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Mail from home worries Henry that Lorraine may be seeing other men. Father Mulcahy presides over a Jewish circumcision ceremony for the Korean-born son of a US GI.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Henry's departure to Tokyo leaves Major Burns in charge of the 4077th. He declares total prohibition of alcohol, which leads to a near riot in the camp.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.sub-title: Archie Is Worried About His Job
programme.desc: Archie stays up all night, expecting a phone call from a security guard who has inside information. It seems his company is laying off and he fears he may lose his job. With Archie not sleeping, no one else in the Bunker household can sleep either and it soon turns into a three ring circus as a cop, a drunk, a pizza delivery man and Edith's friend Clara all stop by at 4 a.m.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Tempers flare in the Bunker household when Archie finds himself with nothing to do but sit around the house.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: When strike negotiations bog down, Archie grudgingly trades places with Edith and allows her to take a job at Jefferson's dry cleaners.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Archie's union serttles the strike,but under terms that effectively leave him worse off than he was before the walkout.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Terminal Hospital, a shy doctor masquerading as a male nurse must save a patient. Then, in The Writer #1, the characters in Harvey's story come to life as he writes them, but they have a hard time keeping up with the ever-changing plot. Finally, in The Plot to Hurt Hitler, the gang parodies a TV friendly version of the classic film "A Plot to Kill Hitler", with Carol playing Marlene Dietrich.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In Pom Pom Girls, Carol and Betty reunite at their high school reunion and sing "Ready to Begin Again". Then, in Mrs. Wiggins, Carol plays a flighty secretary who learns to play blackjack.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: A Man's Teeth Are Not His Own
programme.desc: Rob worries that Jerry will find out he went to a different dentist.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob recalls directing the PTA show with Laura in the starring role.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: The Kramdens and the Nortons fight a rent increase, though Ralph is the only one who really wants to fight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After selling the rope for a hanging, a conscienceless peddler tries to sell the condemned man's father a bag of "magic dust."

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A little boy vanishes in a magic shop, only to reappear later with supernatural powers and evil intentions.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble travels to Washington, D.C., to meet with a lawyer, named Frank Hobart, who wrote a book titled 'Unjustly Convicted,' which states that Kimble was convicted without the benefit of a fair trial due to the bias media circus influencing the judge and

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: An exiled general, Neyron, is living in his private estate in Florida. He's cut a deal with Frank Layton, a Syndicate man. In return for a big payoff of several million dollars to finance his coup, Neyron will let Layton have all gambling rights in his country.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.desc: Lt. Jacoby tries to nail Quoit on a murder charge but is foiled by misinformation.

programme.title: Peter Gunn
programme.desc: Mr. Lederer falls overboard from his yacht at night, and soon after his wife is poisoned. Gunn investigates the suspicious deaths.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Highway Patrol looks into a maintenance service that may have ulterior motives.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: More than $200,000 worth of imperial jade is reported stolen. Friday and Gannon determine the burglary was an inside job.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot while making a routine check on a pair of paroled convicts parked near a liquor store.

programme.title: The Flintstones
programme.desc: Fred and Wilma go on a second honeymoon.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony go on a space mission, and meet a real-life astronaut!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver and Larry find a wallet that contains $89 while on their way to the grocery store to pick up some groceries for June. Surprisingly, Beaver and Larry decide to turn it in at the police station and Beaver finds himself waiting an agonizing week to see if he can keep the money.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver must write a composition about his mother but soon finds himself the only one with a seemingly "boring" mother while Richard, Larry and Judy have colorful mothers. Beaver decides to make his mother colorful, too, even if it means making up things.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Nautical Knot
programme.desc: Mason is summoned when Harvey Scott's efforts to retain temporary control of the family mining company lead to murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A private investigator's daughter shoots some photos that get the wrong man accused of murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Forbes is delighted when his fiancée Angela comes to see him, but is disappointed when he realizes that they have very different plans for the future.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Ben secretly borrows John Boy's car and gets both into trouble

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: An embittered lawman (Fritz Weaver) seeks revenge against the men who destroyed his town and took away his wife.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Frederick Kyle arrives in Virginia City on a mission for the Confederacy. Kyle is also looking for Joe Cartwright. After they meet, Joe starts warming to the idea of helping Kyle out, much to the disappointment of his family.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas encourages a drunken artist charged with murder to use his talents to identify the true killer.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark try to persuade a persecuted young mute to return stolen money.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Revolutionary Bernal Sierra joins the train finding the wife of his dead friend married to Casey Reardon, who sold guns to the Mexican revolutionaries. Bernal is suspicious of Casey, his brothers and Perdita over missing gold.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On an unseasonably hot day, Malloy and Reed suspect that an elusive bicyclist who overreacts to having his air pump stolen in a park is actually a drug pusher. Meanwhile, their investigation of a two-month-long yard sale leads to an armed fugitive.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin today's patrol by investigating a deluded and reclusive parolee whose troubled girlfriend in the apartment next door has just attempted suicide for the second time. In the meantime, they provide vital information to a detective's search for an armed robbery suspect.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: There Is Nothing Like A Nurse
programme.desc: The nurses are evacuated when the threat of an enemy parachute drop arises. Hawkeye and Trapper try to enliven everyone's spirits while they are gone.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Sick and tired of having liver and fish for an 11-day stretch, Hawkeye, driven near to insanity, starts a riot in the mess tent. He and Trapper then orders spare ribs and sauce from his favorite barbecue joint—in Chicago.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye records a letter to his dad, detailing the exploits of a mad Turkish soldier who calls Hawkeye a "damn good Joe," the unfortunate loss of the corpse of a Luxembourg soldier (who turns out not to be dead), Lt. Henri-Batiste LeClerc and a gun-happy officer.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A local dog bites Radar, and the camp conducts a search to find the pooch so that Radar doesn't have to undergo a series of painful rabies vaccinations. Hawkeye defies Frank, to take care of a GI who's suffering from a case of hysterical paralysis.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: An infamous con artist, held temporarily in Mayberry, manages to enchant everyone except Andy.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy tries to help Barney express his lovestruck feelings for Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny wants to plough the front lawn of the mansion to grow vegetables.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Four children from the city spend a week on the farm the Douglases. While Oliver teaches them to plant seeds and milk a cow, Lisa falls in love with the little girl of the group, Lori. The two bond over a batch of banana jelly.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: When a POW is caught at the processing location after Stalag 13, Hogan suspects there is a traitor in the underground. Newkirk and LeBeau help him find out who it is.

programme.title: Hogan's Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan schemes to get a French courier and some Allied bulletproof vests out of Germany.

programme.title: The Carol Burnett Show
programme.sub-title: Guests Jonathan Winters And Eddie Albert
programme.desc: "Guests Jonathan Winters and Eddie Albert. Originally aired on 09/25/67."

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Golden Oranges
programme.desc: Mason goes to the dogs when his defense of a murder suspect hinges on a surprise witness—a dog named Hard Tack. It seems as though Hard Tack holds the key to the murder of a developer who planned to bulldoze orange groves.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While discussing time travel among friends in 1961, a man suddenly finds himself in 1865—on the date of Lincoln's assassination.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: It is New Year's Eve and Mr. Taylor's resolution is to end Mrs. Taylor's extramarital flirtations.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: D.A. Rudolf Cox expects to get a politically valuable conviction with the help of stool pigeon Lou Heinz.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.sub-title: You Can Get Killed Out There
programme.desc: Mannix's attempt to locate a stolen necklace leads him to a case of murder and fraud.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Public prosecutor Mike Arnold needs Cannon's help. He is suspected of the murder of his wife. His problem: Dubious friends want him to finish a corruption investigation.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates a plane crash that resulted in a corporation president's death.

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Dan Matthews follows a senator when word gets out that a racketeer plans to murder him.
